texto: Hey, the ubiquitous Leak-Cam is to 2010 as the bottom-of-the-screen news ticker was to late 2001: What you're seeing beneath the news anchor or talking head may not actually include any new information, but you feel like you're watching something dramatic.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jim Geraghty: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Hey, the ubiquitous Leak-Cam is to 2010 as the bottom-of-the-screen news ticker was to late 2001:…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, deepwater-horizon-oil-spill, humour pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humour e news.

texto: A healthy agency does not require relevance to the national agenda so much as the APPEARANCE of relevance to the national agenda," Humphrey explained. "It is perhaps the second-most important tool in ensuring continued funding.""And the most important?""A friend on the Appropriations committee.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Jim Geraghty que provoca temas ligados a amizade. Ao questionar “A healthy agency does not require relevance to the national agenda so much as the APPEARANCE of r…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre amizade, bureaucracy, civil-service, com foco em termino e civil-service.
